name: api_flux2_pro_2img
description: Flux.2 [pro] API — two-reference composition. Batches two LoadImage inputs through BatchImagesNode and feeds them, along with a text prompt, to the Flux2ProImageNode. Best for paired portraits, two-subject scenes, and reference-driven compositions from two images. Runs via a Comfy Cloud API node (requires a configured API key).

prompt.description: Text prompt describing the composite scene to generate from the two reference images.

image1.description: First reference image (slot 0 in the batch).

image2.description: Second reference image (slot 1 in the batch).
